name: Arthur Copilot prompt responder
description: Processes Arthur voice prompts in this Scout window, writes responses to Arthur's response queue, and marks prompts completed.

steps.label: Main
steps.prompt: Check <SCRATCHPAD_PATH>\arthur_prompt_queue.jsonl for the oldest runnable pending entry. Claim it, refresh heartbeat metadata while running, execute the prompt using normal Scout safety/privacy rules, append a response to arthur_prompt_responses.jsonl, and mark the queue entry completed, failed, or blocked. Do not leave claimed/running entries stale. Close Playwright after browser automation.
